purpose: Self-contained DataDiVR handoff files for downstream agents and notebooks.

files.Pangenome_Housekeeping_Stacked_Trees_net: Pickled NetworkX scene graphs with node, edge, layout, and flow metadata.
files.Pangenome_Housekeeping_Stacked_Trees_pat: Explicit numeric DataDiVR node-id paths only.
Per-path node-id segment pairs plus path metadata.
files.datadivr_coordinate_mappings.json: Per-scene node ids, source node keys, coordinates, colors, and edge ids.
